items.body:
Reservation Confirmation

Dates & Details:

Check-out: Mar 10, 2026 at 10:00 AM
Nights: 4

If anything is incorrect, please let me know ASAP so I can update it before arrival.

Address:
5406 Parker Ave, West Palm Beach, FL 33405
https://www.google.com/maps/place/26.66551,-80.06345

Parking:
Street parking is available on a first-come basis. Driveway parking is limited to registered vehicles.

WIFI:
Network name: ShortTermRental
Password: LoveShortTerm
House Rules:
No smoking or parties/events
Quiet hours: 11:00 PM - 8:00 AM

Hi,

Thanks for booking with us! Your door code is 4001. The code activates at 4 PM on check-in day. Please use the smart lock at the main entrance and message us if you have any trouble.
Please send a quick message after you arrive so we can make sure everything is perfect for your stay.
